contact.title: Let's Create Change Together
contact.sub: Reach out to volunteer, partner, or learn more about our work
contact.loveToHear: We'd love to hear from you
contact.contactIntro: Whether you want to volunteer, partner with us on a project, or just learn more about our work — we're here to connect.
contact.volunteerDesc: Join our plantation drives, teach at community schools, or help with cleanup campaigns. Every helping hand matters.
contact.partnerDesc: We welcome partnerships with schools, gram panchayats, and organizations working towards rural development and environmental conservation.
contact.spreadDesc: Follow us on Instagram and share our stories. Community awareness is the first step to community action.
